title: PriorityQueue
description: Make space for your VIPs on your server
body:
# PriorityQueue - VIP Access Management System

## Overview

This advanced access management solution ensures your most valued players never get locked out of your server during high-traffic periods. When your server reaches capacity, VIP members with the appropriate permission will automatically gain access by temporarily removing a randomly selected non-priority player.

## Key Features

### 🌟 Seamless Priority Access
Players with the designated permission will automatically bypass server queues, ensuring VIPs always have access to your community.

### 🎯 Intelligent Player Selection
The system thoughtfully selects which non-priority player to temporarily remove, ensuring administrators and essential staff are never affected.

### 🛡️ Configurable Exemptions
Prevent specific players from being kicked regardless of their permission status – perfect for ensuring your staff and content creators always remain connected.

### 🔧 Simple Administration
Straightforward commands let you check server status and reload configuration on-the-fly without restarting.

### 💬 Customizable Messages
Personalize all system notifications to match your server's branding and communication style.

### 📊 Debug Mode
Detailed logging options help you understand exactly how the prioritization system is functioning.

## Why Choose This System?

### 💎 Premium Perk Potential
Offer VIP queue-skipping as an attractive donation perk that provides genuine value without affecting gameplay balance.

### 🤝 Community Fairness
The random selection process ensures all standard players have equal treatment, while still respecting your VIP players' investment.

### ⚡ Lightweight Performance
Carefully engineered to handle join events efficiently with minimal impact on server performance.

### 🔒 Secure Implementation
Robust permission system ensures only authorized players receive priority treatment.

## Technical Details

The plugin monitors login attempts and server capacity in real-time. When a priority player attempts to join a full server, the system:

1. Identifies all non-priority players currently online
2. Excludes any specifically exempted players and operators
3. Randomly selects one player from the remaining pool
4. Politely disconnects them with a customizable message
5. Allows the priority player to join immediately
6. Confirms successful priority access with a welcome message

## Perfect For

- Survival servers with regular high-traffic periods
- Premium Minecraft communities offering donor perks
- Servers hosting special events with limited capacity
- Communities with a large, active player base

Elevate your server management and reward your most dedicated community members with a fair, transparent, and effective solution for handling server capacity challenges.

## Installation

1. Place the JAR file in your plugins folder
2. Restart your server or use `/reload /confirm/`
3. Configure settings in the generated config.yml
4. Assign permissions to your priority players
5. Test functionality by filling your server and attempting VIP access

---

*Effortlessly manage server capacity while prioritizing your most valuable players – download today!*
